Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 py -c "
import edge_tts, asyncio

async def test\(\):
    text = '안녕하세요. 테스트입니다.'
    comm = edge_tts.Communicate\(text, 'ko-KR-SunHiNeural'\)
    sm = edge_tts.SubMaker\(\)
    types_seen = set\(\)
    count = 0
    async for chunk in comm.stream\(\):
        types_seen.add\(chunk['type']\)
        if chunk['type'] == 'WordBoundary':
            sm.feed\(chunk\)
            count += 1
    print\(f'Types seen: {types_seen}'\)
    print\(f'WordBoundary count: {count}'\)
    print\(f'Cues: {len\(sm.cues\)}'\)
    srt = sm.get_srt\(\)
    print\(f'SRT length: {len\(srt\)}'\)
    print\(srt[:500]\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 py -c "
from pathlib import Path
content = Path\('channels/my_channel/projects/뇌가소성/subtitle.srt'\).read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\)
import re
blocks = re.split\(r'\\n\\s*\\n', content.strip\(\)\)
over = 0
for b in blocks:
    lines = b.strip\(\).splitlines\(\)
    if len\(lines\) >= 3:
        text = lines[2]
        if len\(text\) > 15:
            over += 1
            if over <= 5:
                print\(f'  [{len\(text\)}자] {text}'\)
print\(f'총 15자 초과: {over}개 / {len\(blocks\)}개'\)
" 2>&1)

import json

        ck = seg.get\('common_keyframes', []\)

        break

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 py -c "
import struct
f = open\('C:/Users/shinh/youtube-auto/channels/why-only-jesus/projects/word-unity/visuals/scene_001.png', 'rb'\)
f.read\(8\)  # PNG signature
f.read\(4\)  # length
f.read\(4\)  # IHDR
w = struct.unpack\('>I', f.read\(4\)\)[0]
h = struct.unpack\('>I', f.read\(4\)\)[0]
print\(f'Image size: {w}x{h}'\)
f.close\(\)
")

path = 'C:/Users/shinh/youtube-auto/channels/why-only-jesus/projects/word-unity/visuals/scenes.json'

print\('scenes.json updated'\)

import json
scenes = json.loads\(open\('C:/Users/shinh/youtube-auto/channels/why-only-jesus/projects/word-unity/visuals/scenes.json', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\)
for s in scenes:
    hook = 'HOOK' if s.get\('is_hook'\) else '    '
    print\(f'  [{hook}] scene_{s[\\"index\\"]:03d}  {s[\\"title\\"][:30]}'\)
print\(\)
hooks = [s for s in scenes if s.get\('is_hook'\)]
print\(f'Hook 씬: {len\(hooks\)}개 → Grok으로 mp4 변환 대상'\)
print\(f'일반 씬: {len\(scenes\) - len\(hooks\)}개 → 이미지 그대로'\)
")
